title: psychotria albopedunculata
intro: Psychotria albopedunculata, also known as the 'White-crested wild coffee', is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria albopedunculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
